name: Dr. Dabber Switch ALN Induction Cup
summary: Dabber Switc h ALN Induction Cup is the pinnacle of induction technology for the Switch.
description: Dabber Switc h ALN Induction Cup is the pinnacle of induction technology for the Switch. Made with aluminium nitride, commonly used in medical, military, and aerospace industries, it possesses unique characteristics. With a thermal conductivity 120 times that of quartz, heat transfer is efficient, resulting in fast heat up times and even temperature distribution without hot or cold zones. Unlike other materials, the ALN cup can withstand high temperatures and sudden changes without melting or cracking. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
